text:
Once upon a time, there was a boy who loved apples. Every Saturday morning, he'd go to the apple orchard his grandfather had.

One day, a big fox saw the boy.

"No fox!", the boy shouted.

Suddenly, an owl swooped down.

"The owl!" the boy cried.

But the owl just hooted.

The next week, the boy brought an extra pie.

The owl swooped down.

"No feathers!", he cried.

That's when the old turkey vulture took flight.

"No feathers!", the boy moaned.

The vulture landed.

"No fancy wings."

Just rows of feathers.

The boy smiled.

That night he had the best apple pie ever.

So did the vulture.

They flew off together.

Always an apple boy.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
